category_sources: Official repository https://github.com/microsoft/pict describes PICT as generating pairwise independent combinatorial test cases.
display_name_sources: Official repository https://github.com/microsoft/pict uses the display name PICT.
source_facts.description expands the uppercase acronym PICT.
docs_sources: Official README at https://github.com/microsoft/pict points to doc/pict.md for detailed PICT documentation.
Official documentation file is hosted in the project repository at https://github.com/microsoft/pict/blob/main/doc/pict.md.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/Microsoft/pict, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official repository https://github.com/microsoft/pict describes PICT as a command-line tool for generating test cases and test configurations.
source_facts.description identifies the pairwise independent combinatorial tool.
